source: Offline trigger runtime backlog and trigger-runtime-policy shared common prototype distilled into a pre-KMP readiness manifest
description: Pins the behavior families that must remain covered before offline trigger get/set orchestration delegates to shared KMP runtime code.

expected.commonDecision: Offline trigger runtime migration may proceed only after trigger-runtime-policy.json and this readiness manifest are executable from shared commonTest, platform facade tests continue to reference the same policy vector, packet-framing differences are preserved in adapters or reconciled explicitly, public facade error mapping is pinned, and the shared tests are compile-verified.

commonRuntimePrototype.status: executable shared commonTest runtime planning guard
commonRuntimePrototype.reason: Declared because this vector is consumed by runtime or fake-transport policy tests before production KMP migration.

notes: This readiness manifest is a migration gate for runtime behavior-family completeness only; byte-level PMD adapter framing, cancellation, cleanup, public facade error mapping, and compile verification remain required before production offline trigger runtime code moves to shared KMP.
